message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.1.1→0.2.0 and remove unused mut in TUI test helpers

Dependency update (Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock):
- Upgrade asupersync from 0.1.1 to 0.2.0 in both [dependencies] and
  [dev-dependencies] sections
- Replace "tracing-integration" feature with "test-internals" in the main
  dependency (test-internals was previously only in dev-dependencies)
- Lockfile regenerated to reflect the new version and its transitive deps

TUI test cleanup (tui.rs):
- Remove unnecessary `mut` qualifier from three `PiConsole::with_color()`
  bindings in test functions (capture_markdown_segments,
  render_markdown_produces_styled_segments,
  render_markdown_code_fence_uses_syntax_highlighting_when_language_present)
  since the console's begin_capture/render_markdown/end_capture API chain
  does not require mutable access

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
